title: Trachypogon polymorphus
taxonomy: Trachypogon polymorphus is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It belongs to the genus Trachypogon, which is a group of tropical and subtropical grasses native to Central and South America. The family Poaceae is a large and diverse group of monocotyledonous flowering plants that includes various types of grasses, sedges, and rushes. Trachypogon polymorphus is further classified as belonging to the subfamily Panicoideae and the tribe Paniceae. The classification of Trachypogon polymorphus reflects its evolutionary relationships and position within the plant kingdom.
